diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,147 @@
+# Core API Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/index.ts
+- Public surface: Exports Hono class and types for Env, Handler, Context, Request, Client
+- Internal names noticed: Hono class import from ./hono, type exports from ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono, ./types, ./context, ./request, ./client
+- Plain-English summary: Main entry point re-exports core functionality from submodules for clean public API
+- Copy-safe detail: Module exports Hono class and type aliases including Env, ErrorHandler, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, Context, HonoRequest, and client type inference helpers
+
+## src/types.ts
+- Public surface: Defines Env, Variables, Handler, MiddlewareHandler, RouterRoute, Input types
+- Internal names noticed: HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, OnHandlerInterface, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Context type imports
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./hono-base, ./utils/headers, ./utils/types, ./router
+- Plain-English summary: Comprehensive type definitions for handlers, routes, environment, and middleware interfaces
+- Copy-safe detail: Contains 1000+ lines of TypeScript interface definitions for handler signatures using variadic parameter patterns (app.get with 1-10 handlers, app.use with 1-10 handlers, app.on variants)
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Public surface: Hono class constructor accepting optional router configuration
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase extend, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter imports
+- Imports or neighbors: ./hono-base, ./router/reg-exp-router, ./router/smart-router, ./router/trie-router, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Main Hono class that extends HonoBase with default SmartRouter configuration
+- Copy-safe detail: 34-line class that instantiates SmartRouter with fallback to RegExpRouter and TrieRouter, accepts optional router option
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Public surface: Router methods (get, post, put, delete, options, patch, all), on, use, fetch, request, mount
+- Internal names noticed: HonoBase class, compose import, Context import, router property, get path utility functions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./compose, ./context, ./router, ./types, ./utils/constants, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Core Hono implementation with router dispatch, middleware handling, route registration, and request dispatch logic
+- Copy-safe detail: 545-line base class with private _basePath and #path fields, constructor sets up all HTTP method handlers, implements error/notFound handlers, supports route grouping via basePath and route methods
+
+## src/context.ts
+- Public surface: Context class with req, set, get, var, header, status, text, json, html, body, redirect, notFound methods
+- Internal names noticed: Context options, execution context, header record types, Data type, Renderer, TypedResponse
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request, ./router, ./types, ./utils/html, ./utils/http-status, ./utils/mime
+- Plain-English summary: Request context object managing request/response lifecycle, variables, headers, and response helpers
+- Copy-safe detail: 780-line class with private #rawRequest, #var Map, #status, #executionCtx, #res, #layout, #renderer fields. Implements text/plain, application/json, text/html responses with proper Content-Type headers
+
+## src/request.ts
+- Public surface: HonoRequest with param, query, queries, header, parseBody, json, text, arrayBuffer, blob, formData, valid, url, method
+- Internal names noticed: HTTPException import, GET_MATCH_RESULT constant, HonoRequest class, validation data, body caching
+- Imports or neighbors: ./http-exception, ./request/constants, ./router, ./types, ./utils/body, ./utils/url
+- Plain-English summary: Request wrapper providing typed access to parameters, query strings, headers, and body parsing with caching
+- Copy-safe detail: 505-line class with #validatedData, #matchResult, routeIndex, bodyCache fields. Implements decode and cache mechanisms for body access (json, text, arrayBuffer, blob, formData)
+
+## src/request/constants.ts
+- Public surface: GET_MATCH_RESULT unique symbol export
+- Internal names noticed: Symbol declaration
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Single constant defining a unique symbol for request match result access
+- Copy-safe detail: One-line file exporting unique symbol used by HonoRequest for accessing match results
+
+## src/utils/body.ts
+- Public surface: parseBody function, BodyData and ParseBodyOptions types
+- Internal names noticed: HonoRequest import, FormData parsing, dot notation support, all option for array parsing
+- Imports or neighbors: ./request
+- Plain-English summary: Form data and body parsing utility with support for dot notation nesting and multi-value fields
+- Copy-safe detail: 233-line module implementing multipart/form-data and application/x-www-form-urlencoded parsing, converts nested dot notation keys to objects, handles arrays via key ending with [] or all option
+
+## src/compose.ts
+- Public surface: compose function for middleware chaining
+- Internal names noticed: Context import, Env import, ErrorHandler, Next, NotFoundHandler
+- Imports or neighbors: ./context, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Middleware composition utility based on koa-compose pattern with error and not-found handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 73-line function creates dispatch index tracker, handles middleware array with error catching, calls next() to dispatch to following middleware, handles not-found responses
+
+## src/http-exception.ts
+- Public surface: HTTPException class extending Error, getResponse method
+- Internal names noticed: ContentfulStatusCode import, response property, message, cause
+- Imports or neighbors: ./utils/http-status
+- Plain-English summary: Standardized HTTP error for authentication failures and other fatal errors requiring custom responses
+- Copy-safe detail: 78-line class with default status 500, optional Response in options, getResponse returns provided response or creates new one with error message
+
+## src/client/index.ts
+- Public surface: hc function export, parseResponse, DetailedError, type exports
+- Internal names noticed: Client class, InferResponseType, InferRequestType, ClientRequestOptions
+- Imports or neighbors: ./client, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: HTTP client module entry point exporting hc helper for type-safe API calls
+- Copy-safe detail: 17-line module re-exports hc proxy-based client factory and parseResponse utility with DetailedError class
+
+## src/client/client.ts
+- Public surface: hc proxy client, ClientRequestImpl class with fetch method
+- Internal names noticed: serialize, mergePath, removeIndexString, replaceUrlParam functions, buildSearchParams, deepMerge
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../types, ../utils/cookie, ./types, ./utils
+- Plain-English summary: Proxy-based HTTP client factory that builds method-chained API clients with search params and form data handling
+- Copy-safe detail: 223-line module implements proxy that captures method/path sequences, ClientRequestImpl handles URL construction with query params and path params, supports JSON and FormData bodies, WebSocket connections via $ws
+
+## src/client/types.ts
+- Public surface: Client, ClientResponse, ClientRequestOptions, Fetch, InferResponseType, InferRequestType
+- Internal names noticed: BuildSearchParamsFn, ExpandAllMethod, TypedURL, MethodNameAll, StandardMethods
+- Imports or neighbors: ../hono, ../hono-base, ../router, ../types, ../utils/http-status, ../utils/types
+- Plain-English summary: Type definitions for HTTP client including client factory types, response types, and complex URL/path inference
+- Copy-safe detail: 393-line typescale with Proxy-based client construction, typed URL generation with path interpolation, status code filtering, response format inference for json/text/ws output formats
+
+## src/client/utils.ts
+- Public surface: mergePath, replaceUrlParam, buildSearchParams, replaceUrlProtocol, removeIndexString, deepMerge, parseResponse
+- Internal names noticed: fetchRP import, DetailedError re-export, Status code filters
+- Imports or neighbors: ../utils/http-status, ./fetch-result-please, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Utility functions for URL manipulation, search params, deep object merging, and client response parsing
+- Copy-safe detail: 114-line module builds URL params from record objects, merges object structures deeply, strips /index suffixes from URLs, detects JSON/text response from content-type header
+
+## src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- Public surface: fetchRP function, DetailedError class
+- Internal names noticed: nullBodyResponses set, detectResponseType helper, jsonRegex
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: Minimal fetch result parser with smart JSON/text detection and structured error throwing
+- Copy-safe detail: 95-line module skips body for status codes 101,204,205,304, detects JSON from application/json header pattern, throws DetailedError with statusCode, code, detail, log properties on non-2xx responses
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- Public surface: fire function, handle export
+- Internal names noticed: addEventListener, FetchEvent, HandleOptions type
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./handler
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker adapter registering Hono app as fetch event listener
+- Copy-safe detail: 36-line module uses addEventListener with fetch event type, passes app and options to handle function, type-safe for Service Worker environment
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- Public surface: handle function
+- Internal names noticed: FetchEvent, Fetch defaults to globalThis.fetch
+- Imports or neighbors: ../../hono, ../../types, ./types
+- Plain-English summary: Service Worker fetch event handler that calls app.fetch and handles 404 fallbacks
+- Copy-safe detail: 37-line function binds fetch to globalThis, wraps app.fetch in Promise, responds with 404 fallback to external fetch when options.fetch provided
+
+## src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts
+- Public surface: FetchEvent interface
+- Internal names noticed: ExtendableEvent, waitUntil, preloadResponse, respondWith
+- Imports or neighbors: None
+- Plain-English summary: TypeScript definitions for Service Worker FetchEvent interface
+- Copy-safe detail: 14-line module defines interface extending Event with waitUntil, clientId, handled, preloadResponse, request, respondingClientId, and respondWith methods
+
+## Path Inventory
+- src/index.ts
+- src/types.ts
+- src/hono.ts
+- src/hono-base.ts
+- src/context.ts
+- src/request.ts
+- src/request/constants.ts
+- src/utils/body.ts
+- src/compose.ts
+- src/http-exception.ts
+- src/client/index.ts
+- src/client/client.ts
+- src/client/types.ts
+- src/client/utils.ts
+- src/client/fetch-result-please.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts
+- src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: core-api-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md. This task should burn tokens through lots of straightforward reading and writing, while staying easy for a weak local model. Do not make any source-code changes. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it is missing. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/index.ts, src/types.ts, src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/context.ts, src/request.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/utils/body.ts, src/compose.ts, src/http-exception.ts, src/client/index.ts, src/client/client.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/client/utils.ts, src/client/fetch-result-please.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/index.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/handler.ts, src/adapter/service-worker/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Core API Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write five short bullets: '- Public surface: ...', '- Internal names noticed: ...', '- Imports or neighbors: ...', '- Plain-English summary: ...', and '- Copy-safe detail: ...'. Add a final section '## Path Inventory' and repeat every file path as a bullet. Keep everything factual and boring. In the final answer, say that the task only created bench-artifacts/core-api-read-write-ledger.md and list any verification command you ran.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
